hooks.command:
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"CONTEXT LIMIT APPROACHING — before this conversation compacts, you MUST do the following in order:
1. Update CLAUDE.md: set the last-updated date, update session number, reflect any new features built or agents completed.
2. Update ROADMAP.md: mark completed items as done, move session items to completed, update the next session plan.
3. Update FIXES.md: document any new bugs found and fixed, or new patterns discovered.
4. Update MIGRATIONS.md: mark any pending migrations as executed if they were run.
5. Run these git commands in C:/Users/Chicce/Desktop/comand-center:
   git add CLAUDE.md ROADMAP.md FIXES.md MIGRATIONS.md app/ components/ lib/
   git commit -m "chore: session checkpoint — sync MD files and code before compaction"
   git push
Do this NOW before responding to anything else."}}'

cd /c/Users/Chicce/Desktop/comand-center && (git status --porcelain | grep -q . && git add -A && git commit -m "auto-checkpoint: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" || true) && (git push 2>&1 | tail -3 || echo "[auto-push] FAILED — local commits NOT on GitHub. Recover: git pull --rebase && git push")
